        2.6 Simulink Model File Integrity  0  0  0  0  1  0
All checks hidden.

  Check Model History properties (18-Feb-2026 17:33:21)

Check models for edited Model History property values
Check that parameters in the Model Properties dialog History pane use the default tags. In the MDL file format you can configure some model properties to make use of source control tool keyword substitution. If you save your model in SLX format, source control tools cannot perform keyword substitution. Any information in the model file from such keyword substitution is cached when you first save the MDL file as SLX, and is never updated again. The Model Properties History pane and any Model Info blocks in your model show stale information from then on.

Passed
This model uses the default value for property ModifiedByFormat.

Passed
This model uses the default value for property ModifiedDateFormat.

Passed
This model uses the default value for property ModelVersionFormat.

        2.10 Code Generation Efficiency  0  0  0  0  9  0
All checks hidden.

  Check optimization settings (18-Feb-2026 20:10:45)

Check optimization settings

Passed
All constraints on model configuration parameters have been met.

Status Parameter Current Value Recommended Values
Pass Block reduction (BlockReduction) on on
Pass Conditional input branch execution (ConditionallyExecuteInputs) on on
Pass Implement logic signals as Boolean data (vs. double) (BooleanDataType) on on
Pass Signal storage reuse (OptimizeBlockIOStorage) on on
Pass Enable local block outputs (LocalBlockOutputs) on on
Pass Reuse local block outputs (BufferReuse) on on
Pass Eliminate superfluous local variables (expression folding) (ExpressionFolding) on on
Pass Use memset to initialize floats and doubles to 0.0 (InitFltsAndDblsToZero) * off off
Pass Remove code from floating-point to integer conversions that wraps out-of-range values (EfficientFloat2IntCast) on on
Pass Inline invariant signals (InlineInvariantSignals) on on
Pass Solver data inconsistency (ConsistencyChecking) none none
Pass Array bounds exceeded (ArrayBoundsChecking) none none
Pass Simulation range checking (SignalRangeChecking) none none
Pass absolute time (SupportAbsoluteTime) off off
Pass Single output/update function (CombineOutputUpdateFcns) on on
Pass Remove root level I/O zero initialization (ZeroExternalMemoryAtStartup) * off off
Pass Remove internal data zero initialization (ZeroInternalMemoryAtStartup) * off off
Pass Pass reusable subsystem outputs as (PassReuseOutputArgsAs) Individual arguments Individual arguments
Pass Ignore test point signals (IgnoreTestpoints) on on
∧ Less


Recommended Action


* The Command-Line values provided in the table are reverse of the settings in the Configuration Parameters Dialog. Therefore, 'on' in the Command-Line corresponds to an "Off" setting in the dialog, and 'off' in the Command-Line corresponds to an "On" setting in the dialog.

Status Parameter Current Value Recommended Values Prerequisites
Pass Model Verification block enabling (AssertControl) DisableAll DisableAll  
D - Pass Shared code placement (UtilityFuncGeneration) Shared location Shared location  
Pass Generate shared constants (GenerateSharedConstants) off off UtilityFuncGeneration
D - Pass System target file (SystemTargetFile) ERT based target ERT based target  
Pass continuous time (SupportContinuousTime) off off SystemTargetFile
Pass Support non-inlined S-functions (SupportNonInlinedSFcns) off off SystemTargetFile
Pass MAT-file logging (MatFileLogging) off off  
Pass Code replacement library (CodeReplacementLibrary) None None, AUTOSAR 4.0  
Pass Parentheses level (ParenthesesLevel) Standards Standards, Maximum SystemTargetFile
Pass Casting modes (CastingMode) Standards Standards SystemTargetFile
Pass System-generated identifiers (InternalIdentifier) Shortened Shortened SystemTargetFile
Pass Signed integer division rounds to (ProdIntDivRoundTo) Zero Zero, Floor  
Pass Use division for fixed-point net slope computation (UseDivisionForNetSlopeComputation) on on, UseDivisionForReciprocalsOfIntegersOnly  
Pass Replace multiplications by powers of two with signed bitwise shifts (EnableSignedLeftShifts) off off SystemTargetFile
Pass Allow right shifts on signed integers (EnableSignedRightShifts) off off SystemTargetFile
Pass Wrap on overflow (IntegerOverflowMsg) error warning, error  
Pass Preserve static keyword in function declarations (PreserveStaticInFcnDecls) on on  
Pass Inf or NaN block output (SignalInfNanChecking) error warning, error  
Pass Dynamic memory allocation in MATLAB functions (MATLABDynamicMemAlloc) off off  
Pass External mode (ExtMode) off off  
Pass Undirected event broadcasts (SFUndirectedBroadcastEventsDiag) error error  
Pass Compile-time recursion limit for MATLAB functions (CompileTimeRecursionLimit) 0 0  
Pass Enable run-time recursion for MATLAB functions (EnableRuntimeRecursion) off off  
D - Pass Include comments (GenerateComments) on on  
Pass MATLAB user comments (MATLABFcnDesc) on on GenerateComments, SystemTargetFile
Pass Leverage target hardware instruction set extensions (InstructionSetExtensions) None None  
∧ Less

Status Parameter Current Value Recommended Values

Pass Pass fixed-size scalar root inputs by value for code generation (ModelReferencePassRootInputsByReference) * on on
Pass Minimize algebraic loop occurrences (ModelReferenceMinAlgLoopOccurrences) off off


Recommended Action


* The Command-Line values provided in the table are reverse of the settings in the Configuration Parameters Dialog. Therefore, 'on' in the Command-Line corresponds to an "Off" setting in the dialog, and 'off' in the Command-Line corresponds to an "On" setting in the dialog.

Recommended Action


* The Command-Line values provided in the table are reverse of the settings in the Configuration Parameters Dialog. Therefore, 'on' in the Command-Line corresponds to an "Off" setting in the dialog, and 'off' in the Command-Line corresponds to an "On" setting in the dialog.

Passed

Passed

Status Parameter Current Value Recommended Values Prerequisites

D - Pass Shared code placement (UtilityFuncGeneration) Shared location Shared location  
Pass Generate shared constants (GenerateSharedConstants) off off UtilityFuncGeneration
D - Pass System target file (SystemTargetFile) ERT based target ERT based target  
Pass continuous time (SupportContinuousTime) off off SystemTargetFile
Pass Support non-inlined S-functions (SupportNonInlinedSFcns) off off SystemTargetFile
Pass MAT-file logging (MatFileLogging) off off  
Pass Code replacement library (CodeReplacementLibrary) None None, AUTOSAR 4.0  
Pass Parentheses level (ParenthesesLevel) Standards Standards, Maximum SystemTargetFile
Pass Casting modes (CastingMode) Standards Standards SystemTargetFile
Pass System-generated identifiers (InternalIdentifier) Shortened Shortened SystemTargetFile
Pass Signed integer division rounds to (ProdIntDivRoundTo) Zero Zero, Floor  
Pass Use division for fixed-point net slope computation (UseDivisionForNetSlopeComputation) on on, UseDivisionForReciprocalsOfIntegersOnly  
Pass Replace multiplications by powers of two with signed bitwise shifts (EnableSignedLeftShifts) off off SystemTargetFile
Pass Allow right shifts on signed integers (EnableSignedRightShifts) off off SystemTargetFile
Pass Wrap on overflow (IntegerOverflowMsg) error warning, error  
Pass Preserve static keyword in function declarations (PreserveStaticInFcnDecls) on on  
Pass Inf or NaN block output (SignalInfNanChecking) error warning, error  
Pass Dynamic memory allocation in MATLAB functions (MATLABDynamicMemAlloc) off off  
Pass External mode (ExtMode) off off  
Pass Undirected event broadcasts (SFUndirectedBroadcastEventsDiag) error error  
Pass Compile-time recursion limit for MATLAB functions (CompileTimeRecursionLimit) 0 0  
Pass Enable run-time recursion for MATLAB functions (EnableRuntimeRecursion) off off  
D - Pass Include comments (GenerateComments) on on  
Pass MATLAB user comments (MATLABFcnDesc) on on GenerateComments, SystemTargetFile
Pass Leverage target hardware instruction set extensions (InstructionSetExtensions) None None

  Check output data type of operation blocks (18-Feb-2026 21:06:25)

jc_0651: Implementing a type conversion

Identify operation blocks that specify output data type.

Warning
Following operation blocks explicitly specify output data type:

  • soc/SOC_Estimation/SocEstimationOutputs_Subsys/AND
  • ..../SOC_Estimation/SocEstimationOutputs_Subsys/BottomOfDischargeResetSubsys/AND
  • ..../SocEstimationOutputs_Subsys/BottomOfDischargeResetSubsys/AND1
  • ..../SocEstimationOutputs_Subsys/BottomOfDischargeResetSubsys/TimerLimit/Enable
  • ..../BottomOfDischargeResetSubsys/TimerLimit/LogicalOperator
  • ..../BottomOfDischargeResetSubsys/TimerLimit/RelationalOperator
  • ..../BottomOfDischargeResetSubsys/TimerLimit/TimerElapsed
  • soc/SOC_Estimation/SocEstimationOutputs_Subsys/TopOfChargeResetSubsys/AND
  • soc/SOC_Estimation/SocEstimationOutputs_Subsys/TopOfChargeResetSubsys/AND1
  • ..../SocEstimationOutputs_Subsys/TopOfChargeResetSubsys/TimerLimit/Enable
  • ..../TopOfChargeResetSubsys/TimerLimit/LogicalOperator
  • ..../TopOfChargeResetSubsys/TimerLimit/RelationalOperator
  • ..../SocEstimationOutputs_Subsys/TopOfChargeResetSubsys/TimerLimit/TimerElapsed
  • ..../SOC_Estimation/SocEstimation_Subsys/NormalState/RestTimeAccumulation/AND
  • ..../SOC_Estimation/SocEstimation_Subsys/NormalState/RestTimeAccumulation/NOT
  • soc/SOC_Estimation/SocEstimation_Subsys/NormalState/RestTimeAccumulation/OR
  • ..../NormalState/RestTimeAccumulation/RestTimeAccumulation_Timer/LogicalOperator
  • ..../RestTimeAccumulation/RestTimeAccumulation_Timer/LogicalOperator1
  • ..../NormalState/RestTimeAccumulation/RestTimeAccumulation_Timer/Timer_s
  • ..../SocEstimation_Subsys/NormalState/SocCorrection_SubSys/GreaterThan1
  • ..../SocEstimation_Subsys/NormalState/SocCorrection_SubSys/GreaterThan2
  • ..../SocCorrectionOnWakeState/SocCorrection_SubSys/GreaterThan1
  • ..../SocCorrectionOnWakeState/SocCorrection_SubSys/GreaterThan2
∧ Less
Recommended Action
Instead of explicitly specifying output data type on operation blocks, use 'Data Type Conversion' block when changing the data type of the block output signal.

  • ..../SocEstimationOutputs_Subsys/TopOfChargeResetSubsys/VeShunt_mA_Battcur
  • ..../SocEstimation_Subsys/NormalState/CoulombCounting_Subsys/LaSoc_frc_IniSoc
  • ..../SocEstimation_Subsys/NormalState/CoulombCounting_Subsys/VeShunt_mA_Battcur

  • ..../SocEstimation_Subsys/NormalState/SocCorrection_SubSys/LaSoc_ms_RqrdRestTi
  • ..../SocEstimation_Subsys/NormalState/SocCorrection_SubSys/LeSoc_ms_restTime
  • ..../SocCorrectionOnWakeState/SocCorrection_SubSys/LaSoc_ms_RqrdRestTi
  • ..../SocCorrectionOnWakeState/SocCorrection_SubSys/LeSoc_ms_restTime
∧ Less
Recommended Action
Move the Inport blocks identified to the left of all other blocks in the diagram.
It is acceptable to move the Inport block to the right only to prevent signal crossings.
_________________________________________________________________________________________

Check positions of Outport blocks

Warning
The following Outport blocks are not placed to the extreme right side of the diagram:

_________________________________________________________________________________________

Simulink Design Verifier Results Summary


Justifications

The following elements are justified from Check result.

Summary Filter Identifier Added by Added on
The flagged decisions are unreachable under validated inputs because index variables are either clamped at boundaries or only assigned values derived from monotonic loop indices. The additional bounds checks are retained intentionally as defensive programming to protect against corrupted or out-of-spec inputs and to improve robustness during integration and testing. These checks do not affect functional behavior and the warnings may be treated as false positives from static range analysis. mathworks.sldv.deadlogic Vamsi 18-Feb-2026 18:51:29

  Detect Integer Overflow (18-Feb-2026 18:54:00)

Identify integer overflow in model 'soc' with Simulink Design Verifier.

Warning
1 objectives are cases of integer overflow in 'soc'.

Simulink Design Verifier proved that integer overflow can occur at runtime.

Check Model Item Test Case
Overflow ..../SocCorrectionOnWakeState/Add View test case


_________________________________________________________________________________________

Warning
Analysis found undecided objectives.

Recommended Action
To extend the results of this check, use Simulink Design Verifier's Design Error Detection. From the Apps tab, select Design Verifier. On the Design Verifier tab, in the Mode section, select Design Error Detection, then click Error Detection Settings. In the Configuration Parameters dialog box, on the Design Error Detection pane, enable Integer overflow.
_________________________________________________________________________________________

Warning
Analysis incomplete due to a time out. Set a higher maximum analysis time and run again. You can extend the time limit by modifying the Maximum Analysis Time edit field on the Design Verifier pane of the configuration dialog by modifying the "MaxProcessTime" attribute of the options object, or by modifying the Configuration option "Override Simulink Design Verifier analysis time-out" in Model Advisor Configuration Editor.
_________________________________________________________________________________________
